[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11011110 6
1 00111011 5
2 11011101 6
3 01101101 5
4 11010110 5
5 10100100 3
6 11101111 7
7 11110110 6

67 76 11101110 6
70 07 11101110 6

72 27 11101111 7 match 6

37 73 11111111 a
